item.title: GMR Airports Joins MomentumNow Stocks on Strong Financial Upswing
item.description: GMR Airports has been added to the MomentumNow Stocks list as of 8 May 2026, reflecting its robust financial performance and compelling momentum in the transport infrastructure sector. The mid-cap company’s recent quarterly results demonstrate significant growth across key metrics, positioning it as a noteworthy contender for investors seeking momentum-driven opportunities in a dynamic market environment. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Arisinfra Solutions Q4 FY26: Strong Profit Surge Masks Valuation Concerns
item.description: Arisinfra Solutions Ltd., a micro-cap trading and distribution company with a market capitalisation of ₹1,237 crores, delivered a robust fourth quarter performance for FY2026, posting consolidated net profit of ₹19.84 crores—a remarkable turnaround from a loss of ₹1.37 crores in the same quarter last year. The stock surged 5.78% to ₹153.85 following the results announcement, extending its impressive three-month rally of 82.50%. However, beneath the headline numbers lies a complex investment narrative characterised by elevated valuations, weak capital efficiency, and mounting leverage concerns that warrant careful scrutiny. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Orient Electric Q4 FY26: Strong Quarter Masks Underlying Margin Pressures
item.description: Orient Electric Ltd., the diversified electrical solutions provider under the CK Birla Group umbrella, delivered a robust fourth quarter performance for FY26, with net profit surging 28.86% year-on-year to ₹40.28 crores, whilst revenue climbed 10.02% to ₹948.25 crores. The stock, however, has struggled to translate operational improvements into market enthusiasm, trading at ₹189.35 as of May 08, 2026, down 19.77% over the past year and 25.70% below its 52-week high of ₹254.85. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Ampvolts Q4 FY26: Revenue Surge Masks Profitability Concerns
item.description: Ampvolts Ltd., a micro-cap software consultancy firm with a market capitalisation of ₹100.00 crores, reported a dramatic revenue acceleration in Q4 FY26 but witnessed a sharp decline in profitability, raising concerns about the sustainability of its recent operational turnaround. The company posted net sales of ₹11.28 crores for the quarter ended March 2026, marking an extraordinary 1,112.90% year-on-year surge and a robust 63.95% quarter-on-quarter growth. However, net profit plummeted 91.50% sequentially to ₹0.13 crores from ₹1.53 crores in Q3 FY26, even as it remained marginally ahead of the year-ago loss of ₹1.20 crores. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Lloyds Enterprises Q4 FY26: Profit Surge Masks Structural Concerns
item.description: Lloyds Enterprises Ltd., a small-cap player in the non-ferrous metals sector with a market capitalisation of ₹10,667 crores, reported consolidated net profit of ₹38.11 crores for Q4 FY26, marking a dramatic turnaround from a loss of ₹7.86 crores in the previous quarter. However, beneath the headline numbers lies a troubling reality: the company's profitability remains heavily dependent on non-operating income, whilst operating margins have compressed sharply year-on-year. The stock, currently trading at ₹71.90, has rallied 2.76% following the results announcement, yet remains 25.41% below its 52-week high of ₹96.39. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Titan Company Q4 FY26: Jewellery Giant Posts Strong Revenue Growth Despite Margin Pressure
item.description: Titan Company Ltd., India's leading jewellery and watch manufacturer, reported net profit of ₹1,179.00 crores for Q4 FY26, marking a 35.36% year-on-year growth but a sequential decline of 29.99% from the previous quarter. The ₹381,149 crore market capitalisation company demonstrated robust top-line momentum with revenues surging 80.48% year-on-year to ₹26,920.00 crores, though profitability metrics came under pressure from elevated interest costs and margin compression. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: State Bank of India Q4 FY26: Profit Growth Slows as Provisions Surge and Other Income Disappoints
item.description: State Bank of India Ltd., the nation's largest public sector lender, reported a net profit of ₹19,683.75 crores for Q4 FY26, marking a modest 5.58% year-on-year growth but a concerning 6.39% sequential decline from the previous quarter's ₹21,028.15 crores. The results, announced after market hours, triggered a sharp 6.62% drop in the stock to ₹1,019.55 on May 08, 2026, reflecting investor disappointment over slowing profit momentum and elevated provisioning. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Modern Shares & Stockbrokers Q4 FY26: Mounting Losses Signal Deep Operational Distress
item.description: Modern Shares & Stockbrokers Ltd., a micro-cap non-banking financial company operating in retail broking and mutual fund distribution, reported a net loss of ₹0.06 crores in Q4 FY26 (Mar'26), marking its second consecutive quarterly loss and deepening concerns about the company's operational viability. The loss represents a deterioration from the ₹0.05 crore loss in Q3 FY26 (Dec'25) and a sharp reversal from the marginal ₹0.05 crore loss recorded in the year-ago quarter. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are Prudent Corporate Advisory Services Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Prudent Corporate Advisory Services Ltd's latest results are strong, with a net profit of ₹59.11 crores and a revenue increase of 27.40% year-on-year, reflecting robust growth and operational efficiency. The company shows solid financial health, but its premium valuation and changing institutional interest should be monitored by investors. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are Dachepalli Publishers Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Dachepalli Publishers Ltd reported strong revenue and profit growth for Q4 FY26, with net sales up 249.32% and net profit up 258.62%. However, the significant decline in operating margins raises concerns about sustainability and potential risks for investors. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are ACME Solar Holdings Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: ACME Solar Holdings Ltd's latest results show strong revenue and profit growth, but rising interest costs and a declining operating margin raise concerns about financial sustainability. Overall, the company is experiencing mixed performance amid growth and financial pressures. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are Jaro Institute of Technol. Mgt. and Research Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Jaro Institute of Technology Management and Research Ltd's latest results show a strong quarterly profit increase to ₹21.33 crores and a 21.30% rise in net sales, but year-on-year sales have declined, raising concerns about sustainability and operational consistency. Investors should remain cautious due to volatility and reduced promoter holding. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are Odigma Consultancy Solutions Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Odigma Consultancy Solutions Ltd's latest results show a mixed performance with a 43.83% sequential revenue recovery to ₹13.75 crores, but a 9.48% year-on-year decline. While the company returned to a net profit of ₹0.13 crores, this was largely due to other income, and operational challenges persist with low margins and negative return on equity. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are Vikram Solar Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Vikram Solar Ltd's latest Q4 FY26 results show strong revenue growth with net sales increasing by 31.36% sequentially, but profitability is under pressure as operating margins declined to 16.14% and interest costs surged, indicating challenges in maintaining financial health. Overall, the results are mixed, highlighting robust demand but significant margin compression. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are Forbes Precision Tools & Machine Parts Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Forbes Precision Tools & Machine Parts Ltd's Q4 FY26 results are positive, with net sales and profit significantly increasing, but long-term growth concerns persist due to modest annual sales growth and contracting operating profit. Overall, while the quarterly performance is strong, structural challenges may impact future prospects. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are Krystal Integrated Services Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Krystal Integrated Services Ltd's latest results show quarterly growth in net profit and sales, but year-on-year sales declined, and rising interest expenses and negative cash flow raise concerns about operational efficiency and financial stability. Overall, the results are mixed, indicating caution is warranted. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are Ceigall India Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Ceigall India Ltd's latest results are strong, with record net sales of ₹1,386.51 crores and a net profit of ₹126.61 crores, reflecting significant year-on-year growth. However, the company faces challenges with high debt levels and rising interest costs, necessitating ongoing financial monitoring. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are Innova Captab Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Innova Captab Ltd's latest results show strong year-on-year growth in sales and profit, but sequential declines in both net sales and profit margins indicate emerging profitability challenges. Overall, while the company is expanding, concerns about cost management and rising interest expenses warrant careful monitoring. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are Harsha Engineers International Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Harsha Engineers International Ltd reported strong quarterly results with a 15.80% sequential sales growth and a net profit increase of 40.57%, marking a significant turnaround. However, the company faces long-term growth challenges, including low annual sales growth and below-industry return on equity, indicating the need for improved capital efficiency. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are ARCL Organics Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: ARCL Organics Ltd's latest Q4 FY26 results show a sequential recovery with a net profit of ₹2.79 crores, but a significant year-on-year decline of 50.18% in profit and 9.59% in revenue, indicating ongoing challenges in demand and rising costs. Overall, while there are signs of improvement, concerns remain about the sustainability of this recovery. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: {{list.post_title}}
item.description: {{list.post_excerpt}} Time: {{list.post_date_sep}}
